tips: Use fs.promises for async file operations instead of fs.callback
process.cwd() returns the current working directory, not the script location
import.meta.url gives the current module's file URL in ESM
Use path.join() or path.resolve() for cross-platform paths — never concatenate with /
os.homedir() returns the user's home directory across all platforms
Use the --env-file flag in Bun to load .env files automatically
process.exit(code) terminates immediately — use for fatal errors only
child_process.execSync runs a command synchronously and returns stdout
Use AbortController to cancel fetch requests and timeouts
